title: Deltarune mod
description: its a deltarune mod that adds dark worlds, shops, Ralsei and weapons!
body:
- My mod adds the dark world, Seem's shop and the junk shop, the four swords that are in deltarune, Ralsei (work in progress), and the K̸͓̈n̵̛̜i̷͎͛f̶͚͐ĕ̵̠!̶͔̐  It also adds the Pencil, Spooky Pencil, Mechanical Pencil, Erasor, Ralsei Horns!
- updates will be made just not regularly!
- deltarune is owned by Toby Fox. I claim no ownership of deltarune just the mod.
- Credit to MCreator for letting me make mods
